title: ADEPTNA 100PCS CONSTRUCTION WOODEN COLOURFUL BUILDING BLOCKS CHILD CHILDREN KIDS TOY FUN EDUCATIONAL BRICKS (100 PIECES BLOCKS)
features: CLASSIC EDUCATIONAL TOY – 100pcs Wooden Building Blocks Set is durable wooden blocks in 4 different colours and 9 shapes. It's a classic educational toy that provides hours of hands-on, screen-free play and learning.
LEARN AND GROW - Playing and building are great ways for children to discover, learn and grow. Different shapes to aid creative and problem solving skills.

FUN AND SAFE TO PLAY - All bricks are big enough and made of non-toxic material to ensure a fun and safe play experience. The blocks have rounded edges and a smooth painted finish that won't splinter with play.

PERFECT GIFT FOR KIDS – 100pcs Wooden Building colourful Blocks Set makes a great gift for kids ages 3 to 8 years. Children can build anything that they can imagine with these colourful wooden building blocks!
HANDY STORAGE TUB - The blocks come in a handy storage tub with lid so they can be neatly stored when not is use. 100 pcs wooden blocks not suitable for children under 36months
description: Product Description Unlock Limitless Imagination with ADEPTNA Classic Wooden Building Blocks Step away from screens and rediscover classic play. The ADEPTNA Wooden Building Blocks set inspires creativity for children aged 3+. With 50 or 100 colourful, multi-shaped pieces, kids can build towers, castles, and cities while enjoying hours of open-ended fun. Crafted for Safe, Confident Play Learn and Grow Through Active Play Playtime becomes learning time. These building blocks help develop fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination, and problem-solving. Sorting by shape or colour introduces early maths concepts, turning every play session into a fun and valuable learning experience. Learn and Grow Through Active Play Playtime becomes learning time. These building blocks help develop fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination, and problem-solving. Sorting by shape or colour introduces early maths concepts, turning every play session into a fun and valuable learning experience. Build, Learn & Play the Natural Way Screen-Free Creativity Encourages children to disconnect from tablets and engage in hands-on, imaginative play that boosts cognitive development. Non-Toxic Made using child-safe paints and materials, providing a safe, reliable play experience and peace of mind for parents and carers. Product Dimensions & Specifications Colours: Red, Blue, Green, Yellow. Total Pieces: Available in 100 PCS sets. Storage Tub: Includes a durable plastic tub with a handle for easy portability and storage. Age Recommendation: Suitable for ages 3 to 8 years (Not suitable for children under 36 months).
